query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  MODIFY COLUMN openId varchar(64) NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN name varchar(64),
  ADD COLUMN identifier varchar(320) UNIQUE AFTER name,
  ADD COLUMN identifierType enum('email','phone') AFTER identifier,
  ADD COLUMN passwordHash varchar(256) AFTER identifierType,
  ADD COLUMN credits int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10000 AFTER passwordHash
